headline: How Deere (DE) Valuation Stacks Up After Right To Repair Settlement
summary: Right to repair settlement puts Deere’s repair model under the spotlight Deere (DE) has agreed to a US$99 million settlement resolving multidistrict right to repair litigation, and has committed to provide farmers and independent service providers with digital repair tools, manuals, and diagnostic software for ten years. See our latest analysis for Deere. Deere shares are trading at US$576.0, and the 90 day share price return of 21.21% and 1 year total shareholder return of 41.30% point to...

headline: Deere Right To Repair Settlement Reshapes Aftermarket Economics And Investor Focus
summary: Deere (NYSE:DE) has agreed to a $99 million settlement to resolve a high profile class action lawsuit over farmers' right to repair its equipment. The settlement includes a commitment to provide farmers and independent repairers with digital tools and resources needed for equipment repairs for the next decade. The agreement addresses long running concerns about access to diagnostic software and could influence repair practices across the agriculture and heavy machinery sectors. For...
